message:
fix: address Copilot review feedback on DashboardPage (#8631) (#8637)

- Guard bridge effect with active-dashboard check to prevent KeepAlive
  from firing the effect on inactive/hidden dashboards
- Use CustomizerSection type instead of narrowing type assertion that
  excluded valid section values like 'collections' and 'widgets'
- Clear widgetCardType and customizerInitialSection in handleAddCards()
  and applyTemplate() to prevent stale state after close flows that
  bypass the onClose handler

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
